name: lyt
description: Safe local media downloads for people and AI agents, powered by yt-dlp.

interface.shortDescription: Safe local media for people and agents
interface.longDescription: Use lyt to download permitted audio or video with safe defaults, machine-readable results, and exact local file paths.
